arts.ttl: 'Promised change, but Juventus are back in crisis'
arts.sum: As Juventus prepare to host Man City in the Champions League, Italian football expert Mina Rzouki looks at why the Old Lady are back in crisis.

arts.ttl: Man City and Chelsea set for £60m boost as FIFA strike Club World Cup TV deal
arts.sum: Manchester City and Chelsea will earn some huge money from FIFA's revamped 32-team Club World Cup, with the two sides the only Premier League representatives at the tournament

arts.ttl: Player ‘living a dream’ at Crystal Palace insists Eagles ‘deserved’ 3 points against Manchester City
arts.sum: Daniel Muñoz is of the belief Crystal Palace should have picked up three points against Manchester City at the weekend. The right-back opened the scoring for Crystal Palace and Manchester City had to come from behind twice to secure a 2-2 draw at Selhurst Park. arts.ttl: Big data speaks: how Real Madrid, Barcelona, Man City, Liverpool... will finish in the Champions League
